titleStmt.title: SII 30.13: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 13. (A.R. No. 91 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple—on the east and north walls of the same shrine King name not mentioned: Dhātu, Puraṭṭāsi 5: 14th c. A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the introduction ‘Chaṇḍēśvaraṉ ōlai.’ It records the provision of maṉṟāṭṭu right with all appurtenances to a devotee, Āḻvāṉ Aṇṇāmalaiyāṉ who carried out repairs in the temple. It also states that this maṉṟāṭṭu right is in addition to the already existing 5 maṉṟāṭṭu which is inforce. A tank by name Aḻiyāviradaṅkoṇḍāṉ kuḷam is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . caṇḍeśvaraṉ Olai sāgarañcūḻ vaiyyakattuk kaṇṭiśvaraṉ karumamārāyka paṇṭe yaṟamceytāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pātantiṟampāmaṟ ceṉṉimel vaittu . Aruḷāl Āti caṇdheśvaraṉ Ādeśam nam bhattaṉ Āḻvāṉ Aṇṇāmalaiyaṉukku nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Uṭaiyār tirumurukaṉpūṇṭiyāḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tāṉattāruṭaṉ Ikkoyiluṅ keṭṭu Ūr maṉṟāṭṭum Āḷvatāka Ivaṉukku nām maṉṟāṭṭuk kuṭukkaiyil
Ivaṉ Ikkoyiṟ tiruppaṇik kuṟaitīrap pala tiruppaṇikkum Ivvūṟ kuḷappāṭṭil tevar koyiṟ tiruppaṇi Ivaṉ Ippoṉ Iruṉūṟu Ippoṉ Iruṉūṟum Ivaṉ Aṭaippikkiṟa Aḻiyāvirataṅ koṇṭāṉ kuḷam niṅkalāka Iṭukaiyil Ivaṉukku nāṅkuṭutta tāṉattār maṉṟāṭṭu Oṉṟu Immaṉṟāṭṭu Oṉṟum muṉpu naṭantu potum tāṉattār maṉṟāṭṭu Aiñcum Ākat tāṉattār maṉṟāṭṭu Āṟu Immaṉṟāṭṭu Āṟuṅkūṭa naṭantu koyiluṅ keṭṭu Ūruṅ kālpāṭu maṉṟāṭṭum Āṇṭu Ūruṅ
kālpāṭum nāṟpāṟkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey meṉokkiṉa maraṅ kiṇokkiṉa kiṇa Eḻuvaṉa muḷaippaṉa maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa sarvvaprāptikaḷum Āṟu maṉṟāṭṭile vakaiyiṭṭu Āṟiloṉṟu Ivaṉ makkaḷ makkaḷ cantirātittavarai Aṉupavittu varuvāṉākavum Itu cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷvatāka nam Ōlai kuṭuttom dhāti samvatsarattu puraṭṭāti mātam 5 nāḷ Ivai cikāḻippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai tirucciṟṟampala nampi
pālvaṇṇattāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai namaccivāyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṇṭiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai takkūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muttikku nāyakaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvampalapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṭikkiḻttaḷattu viyāpāri Āṉantakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tillaik kūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aruḷāl Āticaṇḍeśvara śrīkaraṇattāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
